Records.authors: Borowka, S., Heinrich, G., Jahn, S., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Schlenk, J., Zirke, T.
Records.description: Two-loop three-point vertex graph (called P126 in Davydychev:2003mv) consisting of a massive triangle (three propagators with mass m, solid lines) attached to three massless propagators (dashed). External legs p1, p2 are massless and p3 is off-shell. pySecDec produces numerical results through O(eps^0) at the kinematic point p3^2=9, m^2=1, in agreement with the analytic result of Davydychev:2003mv (Tab. triangle2L).

Records.authors: Borowka, S., Heinrich, G., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Schlenk, J., Zirke, T.
Records.description: Two-loop three-point function with a massive triangle subloop, called P126 in SecDec version 2. Numerical evaluation by SecDec-3.0 at a single kinematic point. Total runtime 144 s. Analytical results known from Davydychev-Smirnov and Bonciani et al; threshold scan in Borowka:2012yc.

Records.authors: Winterhalder, R., Magerya, V., Villa, E., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Butter, A., Heinrich, G., Plehn, T.
Records.description: Two-loop three-point function with a massive sub-triangle, occurring in NLO corrections to Higgs production via gluon fusion. Six propagators: three massive (mass m, forming the inner triangle) and three massless (forming the outer triangle). Three external legs: p1, p2 massless (gluons); p3 off-shell (Higgs, p3^2=m_H^2). Has 5 Feynman parameters. Analytic results known. Matches pySecDec example triangle2L. Used as benchmark for neural network contour deformation.
